originalAlarm.description: Null pointer passed to 2nd parameter expecting 'nonnull'

reasoning: 199501f2a00.c L21: 'strcat(buf, dt)' where dt could be NULL (// ERROR). dt is initialized to NULL at L7 and assigned '-i' only conditionally (rand()%2). When ENABLE_FEATURE_MODPROBE_MULTIPLE_OPTIONS=F, the code at L18-22 executes strcat(buf, dt) where dt may be NULL — null pointer passed to nonnull parameter. PC=!ENABLE_FEATURE_MODPROBE_MULTIPLE_OPTIONS correctly constrains the else-branch path. Known bug.
